prompt: An {argument name="overall theme" default="epic fantasy"} illustration utilizing a {argument name="art style" default="watercolor and ink wash double exposure"} technique on a vintage parchment background. The overall composition forms the {argument name="main silhouette subject" default="right-facing profile of a man's head"}. Inside this silhouette is a complex montage of scenes and characters. At the top, a white tree with red leaves stands near a cliffside castle, with a white winged creature flying on the left and a black dragon breathing fire on the right. Below this, a blonde woman sits on a throne made of swords, while a cloaked figure stands on a hill nearby. In the center right, a romantic couple consisting of a blonde woman and a dark-haired man in a fur collar gaze at each other. To their left stands a knight in full plate armor holding a sword. Below them is a group of 3 figures: a man, a young woman, and a child. At the bottom, a large white wolf head is on the left, and a stag stands near a castle on the right. In the bottom center, a flaming heart hovers above 2 crossed swords and 1 golden crown. The {argument name="dominant color palette" default="muted earthy tones with splashes of red and orange"} creates a dramatic, legendary atmosphere.
translatedPrompt: 一幅 {argument name="overall theme" default="史诗奇幻"} 插画，在复古羊皮纸背景上运用了 {argument name="art style" default="水彩与水墨双重曝光"} 技法。整体构图呈现为 {argument name="main silhouette subject" default="向右的男性头部侧影"}。剪影内部是一个由场景和角色构成的复杂蒙太奇。顶部，一棵红叶白树矗立在悬崖城堡旁，左侧有一只白色翼兽在飞翔，右侧有一条喷火的黑龙。下方，一位金发女性坐在由剑组成的王座上，附近的山丘上站着一个披风人影。中右侧，一对浪漫的情侣——金发女子与身着皮领服装的黑发男子——正深情对视。他们的左侧站着一位手持长剑、身披全身板甲的骑士。再下方是一组 3 位人物：一名男子、一名年轻女子和一个孩子。底部左侧是一个巨大的白狼头，右侧是一头站在城堡附近的雄鹿。底部中央，一颗燃烧的心悬浮在 2 把交叉的剑和 1 顶金冠上方。{argument name="dominant color palette" default="柔和的大地色调点缀着红色与橙色"} 营造出一种充满戏剧性的传奇氛围。

breakdown.creativeCore: 史诗奇幻双重曝光剪影：一幅复杂的双重曝光插画，以男性侧影为轮廓，内部填充了奇幻角色、生物和城堡。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 游戏角色、IP 形象、Cosplay、职业角色设定

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: vintage, fantasy, watercolor, ink wash]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
[是否含文字/精确文字/可读性要求]。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
